rows.label: tev026401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev026401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Brena about Vandham.

rows.label: tev026401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev026401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Brena if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev026401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Brena about Dolls.

rows.label: tev026401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Brena about recent developments.

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0001
rows.name:
One minute he's supervising Doll
maintenance in the test hangar
and administrative district...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Then an hour later, he's standing in a
BLADE base camp on the front lines
discussing battle strategy. I can't keep up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0003
rows.name:
The guy just turns up out of
nowhere. Has he figured out
how to teleport or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0004
rows.name:
At least we've got a commander
who's on the ball. I mean, look
how far he's gotten us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm not big on his freewheeling
attitude, but the city needs somebody
like him now more than ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0011
rows.name:
I work with this technician named Alan. Know
him? Anyway, I'll admit he's gifted, but he
really needs to get his head out of the clouds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0012
rows.name:
He thinks outside the box, which is pretty
great, but the projects he decides to
push forward are just too damn risky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't think it's sunk in that he's not a
trainee anymore. Accidents here have real
consequences that can cost people their lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I wonder if he's ready to take
responsibility for that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0020
rows.name:
If your Doll's arm is compromised,
you won't be able to use the weapon
the Doll is holding. Obvious, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0021
rows.name:
There's no point in buying powerful
weapons unless your Doll is sturdy
enough to hang on to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG0022
rows.name:
So I suggest you pick up arm
parts with adequate armor whenever
you upgrade your weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG1001
rows.name:
I have to hand it to Alan—I never even would
have considered using Growth tech for a new
weapon, let alone actually pulled it off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG1002
rows.name:
He's the only guy I know crazy enough
to think something like that up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG1003
rows.name:
I've been critical of him and
called him irresponsible, but
he made the right call here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG1004
rows.name:
All this time, I've been so scared of making a
mistake and getting blamed for it that I've
stopped myself from doing anything significant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026401_MSG1005
rows.name:
Well, this project has been a wake-up call.
I'll try to be more like Alan and Lin and
take a courageous approach to my work![ST:wait ]
